heading: Capital offenses
label: 3281 Capital offenses
text: An indictment for any offense punishable by death may be found at any time without limitation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., §§ 581a, 581b (, §§ 1, 2, ).Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 41953 Stat. 1198Sections 581a and 581b of title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., were consolidated into this section without change of substance.
Amendments1994— struck out before period at end “except for offenses barred by the provisions of law existing on ”.Pub. L. 103–322August 4, 1939
